title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Phi, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, embed, pull and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno and browsers (fetch-based).

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you swap Ollama models into any chain, agent or retrieval pipeline.

title: LlamaIndex Ollama Integration
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embed connectors to build local RAG apps backed by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now named Open-WebUI) with multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library providing typed requests, streaming chat and embed endpoints.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for integrating Ollama into Rails or plain Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat shell with conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama completions, inline chat and explain features.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) published to Docker Hub with multi-arch support.

title: ollama-chat-mac
summary: Native macOS Swift menu-bar app for chatting with Ollama models without a browser.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama and popular models for reproducible local deployments.

title: ollama-hass-addon
summary: Home Assistant add-on exposing Ollama as a local AI service for automations and voice assistants.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET client library and Aspire component for integrating Ollama into C# applications.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Minimal Zig client demonstrating how to talk to Ollama’s HTTP API with std.http.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async/await bindings and typed structs for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-model-importer
summary: CLI utility to bulk-convert Hugging Face models into Ollama Modelfile format and push them.

title: ollama-gui-react
summary: Lightweight React front-end that streams Ollama completions via EventSource and Tailwind CSS.
